title: Migrate to cobra CLI
body:
We intend to migrate to the cobra cli from urfave/cli because the
project is more well maintained.  There are also some technical reasons
as well which extend into our remote client work.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: This PR is not ready for review yet.  I'm first trying to see if we can pas integration testing with what we have.  Next I will need to conduct a majorly painful rebase.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). This is ready for review while I try to convince make vendor and the integrations tests that we are cool
tested with rootless containers, and it seems to work
Great work, @baude! `make vendor` seems happy now :+1:

LGTM too, I'm sure there'll be a few things that shake out from this, but I say ship this now and fix any malingering issues later.

Really, really nice job here @baude.
